title: Shuriken Variety
description: A Forge mod that adds lots of different fun types of shuriken.
body:
Shuriken Variety Shuriken Variety adds 9 types of different shurikens to Minecraft! Eight of these have special abilities, the other one is a normal shuriken. Theres the Shuriken, Water Shuriken, Fire Shuriken, Lava Shuriken, Explosive Shuriken, Lightning Shuriken, Air Shuriken, Earth Shuriken and Frost Shuriken. Shuriken - Deals 6 health upon hitting any entity - It has no special ability Crafting Recipe:  
Explosive Shuriken - Deals 5 health upon hitting any entity - Causes a TNT explosion wherever it lands Crafting Recipe:  
Lightning Shuriken - Deals 5 health upon hitting any entity - Summons two lightning bolts wherever it lands Crafting Recipe:  
Water Shuriken - Deals 6 health upon hitting any entity - Places water where it lands, whether it's a block or an entity Crafting Recipe:  
Fire Shuriken - Deals 6 health upon hitting any entity - Places fire where it lands - Sets any entity it hits on fire Crafting Recipe:  
Air Shuriken - Deals 4 health upon hitting any entity - Has a high knockback against entities - When hitting a block, it removes a 3x1x3 space Crafting Recipe:  
 
Earth Shuriken - Deals 4 health upon hitting any entity - Places a 3x3x3 cube of dirt and stone where it lands, whether it's a block or an entity Crafting Recipe:  
Lava Shuriken - Deals 6 health upon hitting any entity - Places lava where it lands, whether it's a block or an entity Crafting Recipe:  
Frost Shuriken - Deals 6 health upon hitting any entity - When hitting a block, it places a packed ice block - When hitting an entity, it deals some frost damage Crafting Recipe:  
That's all the shurikens, but wait... Did you see that weird block in the Lightning Shuriken recipe? This mod adds this new Lightning Block! Lightning Block - Makes entities move faster on it - Emits 15 power of redstone - Emits a light level of 15 Crafting Recipe:  
And what's that weird looking item used to craft the Lightning Block? It's called a Lightning Fragment! Lightning Fragment This item is only obtainable when a lightning bolt strikes any entity. It'll drop a few of these fragments when striking any entity. Enjoy all these new shurikens and lightning stuff!! If you have any questions or suggestions please feel free to join my mods server: https://discord.gg/s7xYjBWDu4   Made by RoCris
